rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component or implementation scope after subcomponents and connections
Preserve existing AADL architecture by not modifying component types or implementations
Use visible identifiers from the current component scope for AGREE references
Do not invent new declarations for unresolved references; delete or rewrite clauses instead
generic_rules: Maintain architectural integrity by not altering component types or implementations
Use only visible identifiers from the current component scope for AGREE references
Preserve existing subcomponents and connections when inserting annex blocks
Do not invent new declarations for unresolved references; delete or rewrite clauses instead
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are written inside `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks
Use exact visible identifiers from the current component scope for AGREE references
anti_patterns: Do not modify component types or implementations when inserting annex blocks
Do not invent new declarations for unresolved references; delete or rewrite clauses instead
irrelevant_topics: AADL timing properties are not automatically in AGREE expression scope as variables
Model dependency staging issues may cause unresolved references to packages or data types
